name: SpotDB Ephemeral Data Sandbox MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing ephemeral data sandboxes for AI workflows with built-in guardrails and security controls. Enables agents to create temporary data stores for workflow state, intermediate results, and scratchpad operations — with automatic cleanup and security boundaries to prevent agents from persisting sensitive data unintentionally.
use_cases: Temporary data storage for multi-step AI workflow intermediate results
Scratchpad operations for complex agent reasoning requiring state persistence
Sandboxed data processing with automatic cleanup after workflow completion
Agent workflow isolation — preventing cross-contamination between parallel agents
not_for: Permanent data storage (ephemeral by design — data does not persist)
Large dataset storage (sandbox/scratchpad use case focus)
best_when: A multi-step AI agent needs temporary data storage for workflow state — intermediate results, scratchpad data — with automatic cleanup and security controls to prevent accidental data persistence.
avoid_when: You need persistent data storage across sessions. SpotDB's ephemeral design means data is automatically cleaned up after workflows complete.

auth.notes: No external auth — local or process-scoped ephemeral storage. Security via isolation and process boundaries.

pricing.notes: Free open source. No external API costs.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits — bounded by local system resources

known_agent_gotchas: Ephemeral by design — data is automatically cleaned up; do not use for data you need to persist
Security guardrails need verification — confirm isolation model matches your agent architecture
Novel concept in the MCP ecosystem — verify the sandbox isolation is sufficient for your security model
Community project (aliengiraffe) — verify cleanup behavior under various failure modes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Ephemeral local storage. Process-scope isolation. Security guardrails built-in per description — verify isolation model. No sensitive data should be stored even in ephemeral sandboxes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ephemeral storage with built-in guardrails. Local process isolation. Verify sandbox model.
